title: Unauthorized Mining Activity Reported
description: Community members have reported unauthorized artisanal mining activities in the protected heritage area near the Two Rivers settlement.

title: Procurement Irregularities Suspected
description: Concerns raised regarding procurement processes for local contractors in the SLP programs - potential fronting practices observed.

title: Demand for Employment Transparency
description: Petition signed by 250 community members demanding transparent disclosure of all employment positions and hiring criteria at Anglo American operations.

title: Water Quality Monitoring Request
description: Community petition requesting independent water quality testing at all water points adjacent to mining operations.

title: Youth Skills Development Program
description: Newly approved youth skills development program in partnership with the NYDA and mining companies. Open for applications.

title: Local Contractor Development Training
description: Call for local contractors to participate in contractor development and BEE compliance training program.

title: Scholarship Fund Misallocation
description: Report of potential misallocation of community scholarship funds designated for tertiary education support.
resolution: Funds were reallocated correctly after audit. No evidence of misconduct found.

title: Heritage Site Protection Meeting
description: Community meeting scheduled to discuss protection of historical and cultural heritage sites within mining concession areas.
